sections.paragraph: in pause קֶֽרִי m. (from the root קָרָה) a hostile encounter, Lev 26:28 in this phrase, הָלַךְ קְרִי עִם, to go into, encounter, (to fight) with any one, i.e. to oppose oneself, to resist any one, Lev 26:21, 23 Lev 26:23 בִּקְרִי, Lev 26:24, 27 Lev 26:27, 40 Lev 26:40, 41 Lev 26:41.
